title: tithymalus × peisonis
intro: Tithymalus × peisonis, a hybrid plant also known as Euphorbia × peisonis, is a succulent species derived from the cross between Euphorbia peplus and Euphorbia tithymaloides. The plant contains diterpenoid esters, which are responsible for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The health benefits of Tithymalus × peisonis include its potential to accelerate wound healing, reduce pain, and exhibit antiviral properties. In herbal preparations, the plant is often used in the form of a salve or ointment to treat skin irritations and wounds, with some studies suggesting its potential use as a topical treatment for skin cancer.
